name: T T J Holdings Limited
summary: T T J Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the design, supply, fabrication, and erection of various structural steel works in Singapore, Malaysia, and Thailand. It operates through Structural Steel, Waste Management and Treatment, and Other segments. It offers structural steel works used in the construction of buildings, factories, plants, and infrastructures; and fabricates and installs various cranes and lifting equipment used in shipyards, factories, and construction sites, as well as handles heavy lifting operations, such as launching of heavy trusses, viaduct beams for MRT, and LRT. The company also designs and develops various standard two-rail and three-rail aluminum parapets for use in flyovers and expressways; fabricates and installs various bomb shelter doors for the HDB, MOE, and SMRT; and offers mechanized car parking systems. In addition, it manufactures and sells wood pallets; and operates dormitories. T T J Holdings Limited was founded in 1981 and is based in Singapore.
